classes.title: Pop- Up Mosaic workshop
classes.description:
This one-step mosaic workshop is designed for you to complete and take your finished project home the very same day! Whether you're a complete beginner or have some mosaic experience, this class offers a fun and creative way to learn a new skill while creating a unique piece of art.
Throughout the workshop, we will guide you through every step of the process, from planning your design to placing and securing your mosaic pieces. You'll learn how to safely cut and break glass and ceramic materials, explore different mosaic techniques, and discover tips for creating beautiful patterns, textures, and color combinations.
All materials and tools are provided, and our instructors will be available to offer hands-on assistance and creative guidance throughout the class. By the end of the workshop, you'll leave with a completed mosaic project that reflects your personal style, along with the knowledge and confidence to continue exploring mosaic art on your own.
Come ready to relax, get creative, and enjoy a rewarding artistic experience with a finished piece you'll be proud to display or gift!

classes.title: Broken Plates!
classes.description:
Together, let's learn how to break ceramic plates and transform them into something beautiful! Through this hands-on mosaic workshop, you'll discover how to safely cut, shape, and arrange ceramic pieces, then put them back together piece by piece to create a unique work of art.
We'll guide you through each step of the process, from choosing your design and color palette to placing and securing each piece. No prior experience is needed for this workshop is perfect for beginners as well as those looking to explore their creativity in a fun and relaxing environment.
All materials are included, and by the end of the session you'll have a beautiful handmade mosaic to proudly display or give as a gift. Join us for a creative experience where broken pieces come together to create something truly special and take your finished project home the very same day!
classes.location: Six Points Pub 574 Bloomfield Avenue Bloomfield, NJ
